ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Get this from your lavadocs.com account settings. Keep it secret, keep it safe!
ast.target: 从您的 lavadocs.com 账户设置中获取此密钥。请保密并妥善保管！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open Lavadocs in a new window after pushing your doc.
ast.target: 推送文档后在新窗口中打开 Lavadocs。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you're hosting your own Lavadocs instance, enter the full url here.
ast.target: 如果您托管自己的 Lavadocs 实例，请在此处输入完整的 URL。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 推送后在新窗口中打开

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unauthorized, the gates are closed! Check your Lava Key in the settings.
ast.target: 未授权，大门已关闭！请在设置中检查您的 Lava 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Out of documents! Upgrade your account to push more.
ast.target: 文档数量已用尽！请升级您的账户以推送更多文档。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Instance of Lavadocs not found. Check the URL in the settings.
ast.target: 未找到 Lavadocs 实例。请检查设置中的 URL。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: SSL protocol error. Check that your Lavadocs instance is serving on https, or change your URL to regular http.
ast.target: SSL 协议错误。请检查您的 Lavadocs 实例是否通过 https 提供服务，或将您的 URL 更改为常规 http。
